products.name: EMBROCHARM VINTAGE BLACK
products.description: This elegant tote bag features a sophisticated black-and-white floral pattern, making it a timeless and versatile accessory. The bag is designed with sturdy black faux leather handles and trim, adding a touch of luxury and durability. Its structured silhouette ensures ample space for daily essentials, making it ideal for work, shopping, or casual outings. Gold-tone hardware accents provide a refined finish, while the side strap detail enhances its stylish appeal. Perfect for those who love a blend of classic charm and modern functionality, this bag is a statement piece for any wardrobe.

products.name: SUNSHINE TOTE BROWN
products.description: Elegance meets versatility in our beautiful Scrunchie Bag that effortlessly transition from work to friends and family gatherings. It has single compartment with double inner pockets and an outside zip pocket making this sophisticated ensemble spacious. Crafted from good quality material, our affordable bag is built to withstand the test of time, ensuring you'll always look fashionable.

products.name: TOTES (PINE GREEN)
products.description:
🌲 PINE GREEN ELEGANCE TOTE BAG
Elevate your everyday look with this stunning Pine Green Tote Bag — a perfect blend of sophistication and practicality. Designed for modern women who love timeless style with functionality.
✨ Color: Pine Green

👜 Features:

Perfect for daily use, office, university, travel, and casual outings.

A classy everyday companion that keeps you organized while making a statement. 💚

products.name: K-VYBE
products.description:
Material: Made of canvas or cotton fabric, providing durability and eco-friendliness.
Color: Off-white or natural beige base.
Design: Features a vibrant, hand-drawn-style print with Hawaiian-inspired elements.
Illustrations: Includes a bus, flowers, a boba drink, a bottle, and a food bowl.
Text: "IT'S KAU KAU TIME!" – a fun phrase associated with food and eating in Hawaiian culture.
Style: Casual and playful, suitable for daily use or travel.
Handles: Two sturdy fabric handles for easy carrying.
Purpose: Ideal for shopping, beach trips, or as a stylish reusable bag.
Each canvas tote bag measures 15 x 16 inches or 38 x 40 cm. It’s large enough for you when you go to office, market, the beach, travel and go shopping, camping, hiking etc. NOTE: washing bags in cold water is better than machine-washing.

products.description:
Material: Canvas or cotton fabric, eco-friendly and lightweight.

products.name: LYLAH
products.description:
Material: Made from natural canvas or cotton fabric, eco-friendly and durable.
Color: Beige/off-white base with a soft brown-toned abstract background.
Design: Features a modern, minimalist line-art drawing of two abstract female faces intertwined, creating an artistic and sophisticated look.
Art Style: Continuous line art with a contemporary aesthetic, emphasizing simplicity and elegance.
Handles: Sturdy and comfortable fabric handles for easy carrying.
Purpose: Ideal for everyday use, shopping, casual outings, or as a trendy fashion statement.
Branding: Features a subtle watermark or logo ("art ati"), indicating an artist or brand identity.
Each canvas tote bag measures 15 x 16 inches or 38 x 40 cm. It’s large enough for you when you go to office, market, the beach, travel and go shopping, camping, hiking etc. NOTE: washing bags in cold water is better than machine-washing.

products.name: PETALPOP
products.description:
🌸 PRODUCT DESCRIPTION:
Add a pop of floral flair to your everyday look with the PetalPop™ Floral Handbag – where fashion meets functionality in full bloom!
Featuring a bold pink flower print on a sleek black canvas, this eye-catching tote bag is perfect for modern women who love to make a style statement. Whether you're heading to brunch, work, or shopping, PetalPop™ brings color, charm, and convenience to your day.
Crafted with durable materials and soft leather-style handles, it’s lightweight yet spacious – ideal for carrying your daily essentials in style.
✅ WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT:
🌺 Unique floral design that stands out
👜 Spacious interior – fits phone, wallet, makeup & more
🔐 Front zipper pocket for quick-access items
💼 Comfortable double handles – carry it all day with ease
🎁 Great gift for birthdays, holidays, or just because!
📏 SPECIFICATIONS:
Material: Durable canvas with PU leather handles
Closure: Zipper
Straps: Dual shoulder handles
Size: Medium – ideal for everyday use
Colors: Black base with pink floral print
🔍 PERFECT FOR:
Daily errands & outings
College & office use
Travel & weekend trips
Fashion-forward women & teens
Bring your outfit to life – grab your PetalPop™ today and bloom in style!

products.name: SELF LOVE DIVINE
products.description:
Material: Made of natural canvas or cotton fabric, eco-friendly and reusable.
Color: Neutral beige base with a printed illustration.
Design: Features a minimalist, modern portrait of a woman with long black hair, closed eyes, and a relaxed expression. She wears a light-colored outfit, and the background of the artwork is soft blue.
Art Style: Abstract and aesthetic, focusing on simplicity and elegance.
Handles: Long, durable fabric handles for easy carrying.
Purpose: Perfect for daily use, casual outings, shopping, or as a stylish statement piece.
Each canvas tote bag measures 15 x 16 inches or 38 x 40 cm. It’s large enough for you when you go to office, market, the beach, travel and go shopping, camping, hiking etc. NOTE: washing bags in cold water is better than machine-washing.
